case_title: JONATHAN WOODBURY VS. BREWPUB, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WOODBURY, JONATHAN

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED AND JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODBURY, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BREWPUB, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO BRWWING COMPANY THE SAN FRANCISCO BREWING COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED COMPANY

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODBURY, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BREWPUB, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO BRWWING COMPANY THE SAN FRANCISCO BREWING COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
